heading: Vector Store
body:
`MongoDBAtlasVectorSearch` is a [vector store](https://python.langchain.com/docs/how_to/#vector-stores)
that allows you to store and retrieve vector embeddings from a
collection in MongoDB. You can use this component to store
embeddings from your data and retrieve them using MongoDB Vector Search.

This component requires an [index definition](avs-types-vector-search).
